canonical_definition: A large-scale, cross-national benchmark derived from the International Social Survey Programme (ISSP) that evaluates LLMs' ability to simulate human responses in sociological surveys across 10 domains and over 30 countries.
papers: DiMo-GUI: Advancing Test-time Scaling inGUIGrounding via Modality-Aware Visual Reasoning
